description: Example status-ignore template. Copy this file (or selected entries) to one of the active locations to take effect: <project>/.ai-config-sync-manager/status-ignore.json (project scope, checked first) or ~/.ai-config-sync-manager/rules/status-ignore.json (global). Each entry is either a string selector ('area:item' or a path glob) or an object with optional fields {scope, area, item, host, path, term}. Fields combine with AND. `path` matches the entry's resolved file paths via substring or glob. `term` is a line-level mask: when comparing files, lines containing the substring are removed from both sides before the diff. Conflicts that disappear after the mask are hidden; differences in other lines stay visible. `term` does not apply to missing-on-one-side entries.
